scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v --remove-orphans; docker rm -f db2ai-pagila 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:up
scripts.db:sakila:reset: docker rm -f db2ai-sakila 2>/dev/null || true; npm run db:sakila:up
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec pagila psql -U postgres -d pagila
scripts.db:mysql: docker compose exec sakila mysql -u sakila -pp_ssW0rd sakila
